title: Apple’s OpenAI lawsuit is about who gets to define the post-smartphone era
summary: Apple is suing OpenAI for alleged trade secret theft by ex-Apple employees and unauthorized server access related to hardware manufacturing. The lawsuit carries serious legal weight given Apple's history as a tenacious litigator, but poses significant financial and operational strain on OpenAI—a cash-burning company already managing multiple crises.
content:
Today on Decoder, I’m talking with Hayden Field, The Verge’s senior AI reporter, about the major trade secrets lawsuit between Apple and OpenAI and what this tells us about OpenAI’s future.
By now I’m sure most Decoder listeners are familiar with Apple’s allegations in this case. The company says a number of ex-Apple employees at OpenAI targeted Apple’s trade secrets in job interviews and even downloaded files from Apple’s servers related to hardware manufacturing. The claims are shocking, although OpenAI denies them, and we have yet to see the company’s legal response.
Hayden has been covering OpenAI for years now, and she also just talked to a bunch of lawyers who specialize in intellectual property and trade secret law to get a sense of how serious this case is. The answer is not entirely positive for OpenAI, which spent $6.5 billion to acquire legendary Apple designer Jony Ive’s AI hardware startup, io Products, back in 2025. 
As you’ll hear Hayden explain, Apple is a notoriously tenacious litigant, and we have lots of tech industry history to back up that reputation. But those cases were against companies at the scale of Microsoft and Samsung, giant corporations that could afford the cost and distraction of this kind of litigation.
OpenAI isn’t yet that kind of company. It’s still burning cash and a little strategically adrift as it tries to compete in both enterprise and consumer markets, and it’s turning over executives on a regular basis. So Hayden and I spent a lot of time talking about what this case might mean for a company that defined the early part of the AI boom, but which lately always seems to be in a crisis of one sort or another.
Okay: Verge senior AI reporter Hayden Field on the Apple-OpenAI lawsuit, and how the AI industry might change because of it. Here we go.


This interview has been lightly edited for length and clarity. 
Hayden Field, you’re the senior AI reporter for The Verge. Welcome back to Decoder.
Thanks. Great to be here.
Once again

zh.title: 苹果起诉OpenAI案涉及谁来定义后智能手机时代
zh.summary: 苹果起诉OpenAI涉及前苹果员工盗取商业机密和未经授权访问与硬件制造相关的服务器。鉴于苹果历来作为执着诉讼者的记录，该诉讼具有重大法律分量，但对OpenAI造成重大财务和运营压力——这家公司正在烧钱并处理多个危机。

title: Ford bets on Apple for its next-generation of EVs
summary: Ford is the first automaker to integrate Apple's developer tools to embed Apple Maps directly into its vehicle infotainment systems. This partnership marks a major expansion of Apple's presence in automotive technology.
content: Ford is the first automaker to use a new set of developer tools that will let it embed Apple Maps navigation and mapping directly into its vehicles' infotainment systems.

zh.title: 福特押注苹果的下一代电动汽车
zh.summary: 福特是第一家整合苹果开发者工具以将苹果地图直接嵌入其车载信息娱乐系统的汽车制造商。这一合作伙伴关系标志着苹果在汽车技术中的存在显著扩大。

title: Ford picks Apple Maps for its next EV platform and updated BlueCruise
summary: Ford is embedding Apple Maps into its upcoming Universal Electric Vehicle Platform launching in 2027, offering turn-by-turn navigation and intelligent EV routing without requiring an iPhone. This integration demonstrates Apple's deepening role in automotive software infrastructure.
content:
Ford plans to embed Apple Maps directly into its Universal Electric Vehicle Platform, which will start with a $30,000 midsize pickup truck set for release in 2027. In an announcement on Thursday, Ford says it will use Apple Maps to offer "turn-by-turn directions using natural language, real-time traffic and incident information, intuitive search featuring detailed place cards, and routing options."
The vehicle will also have an intelligent EV routing feature and battery preconditioning. Since the Apple Maps system will be integrated into Ford's upcoming platform, drivers won't need an iPhone to use it - though Ford notes that CarPlay will s …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 福特为其下一代电动汽车平台和更新的BlueCruise选择苹果地图
zh.summary: 福特将苹果地图嵌入其2027年推出的通用电动汽车平台，提供转向导航和智能电动汽车路由，无需iPhone。这一整合表明苹果在汽车软件基础设施中的角色不断加深。

title: The sci-fi movie that imagines AI isn’t so dystopian after all
summary: Director Hirokazu Kore-eda's new sci-fi film "Sheep in the Box" imagines AI technology as a compassionate solution rather than a threat, depicting a robotic child replacement after a family tragedy. The film offers a more optimistic counternarrative to typical dystopian AI narratives.
content:
Imagine you are the parent of an inquisitive seven-year-old who loves his family, playing baseball, and hanging out with his friends. It's the life you've always wanted. And then the worst thing that ever could happen happens: A freak accident takes your son away. But as it turns out, you don't have to live with the grief for long, because now there's an AI company that can bring your kid back in the form of a robotic double that looks indistinguishable from a human.
This is the world that acclaimed director Hirokazu Kore-eda, who won the Palme d'Or for his 2018 feature Shoplifters, has created with his latest sci-fi drama, Sheep in the Box …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 这部科幻电影想象人工智能并不那么反乌托邦
zh.summary: 导演是枝裕和的新科幻电影《盒子里的羊》将人工智能技术想象为一个富有同情心的解决方案而非威胁，描绘了家庭悲剧后用机器人儿童进行替代。该电影为典型的反乌托邦人工智能叙事提供了更加乐观的反叙事视角。

title: The right-wing boomers protesting data centers have a lot in common with the left
summary: Grassroots activists across the political spectrum are protesting hyperscale AI data center expansion in their communities, seeking permanent bans rather than temporary moratoriums. The bipartisan opposition reflects growing local resistance to AI infrastructure development.
content:
A person holds signs during a nationwide protest against AI data center expansion outside Peace Hall in New Port Richey, Florida. | AFP via Getty Images	

On a gray, humid Saturday morning in central Florida, a little under a dozen people gathered outside the Spring Hill Branch Library to protest the construction of a hyperscale data center in their community. There was no immediate threat - the Hernando County commission had unanimously approved a one-year moratorium on such developments in June - but the organizers weren't satisfied. A temporary pause wouldn't be enough. They wanted a ban.
"We are going to fight, fight, fight," said a 71-year-old woman named Carol, who was manning a table with flyers and a petition the group, No Data Centers Hernando County, planned on presenting to the loc …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 抗议数据中心的右翼婴儿潮一代与左翼有很多共同点
zh.summary: 来自政治光谱各阶层的草根活动人士正在抗议其社区内的超大规模人工智能数据中心扩建，寻求永久禁令而非临时暂停。两党的反对反映了对人工智能基础设施开发日益增长的本地抵触。

title: White House report says Trump can usher in a "new golden age" of science
summary: A White House report claims the Trump administration can deliver a scientific renaissance, though it blends substantive policy proposals with partisan grievances. The report outlines the administration's vision for science and technology advancement.
content: The resulting report is a near-random mixture of real problems and grievances.

zh.title: 白宫报告称特朗普可以开启科学的"新黄金时代"
zh.summary: 一份白宫报告声称特朗普政府可以实现科学复兴，尽管其混合了实质性政策提议与党派怨言。该报告概述了政府对科学和技术进步的愿景。

title: I wanted a clock that never needed setting. Things escalated.
summary: A software engineer's quest to build a self-setting clock spiraled into an elaborate system featuring automated deployment pipelines and unnecessary engineering complexity. The humorous account illustrates the tendency toward overengineering simple solutions.
content: Sure, maybe your clock has a backup battery, but mine has a deployment pipeline!

zh.title: 我想要一个永远无需设置的时钟。事情变得一发不可收拾。
zh.summary: 一位软件工程师为构建自动校准时钟的尝试演变成了一个复杂的系统，具备自动化部署管道和不必要的工程复杂性。这个幽默的叙述说明了人们对简单方案进行过度工程化的倾向。

title: Experts say exploiting Anthropic’s Fable isn’t how Kimi K3 got so good
summary: AI experts dispute claims that China's Kimi K3 model achieved its capabilities through model distillation of Anthropic's Fable, suggesting the advancement came through alternative methods. The debate underscores questions about competitive AI development practices.
content: "I don't think you get a model this strong and this quickly on the heels of Fable doing strictly distillation," one expert told TechCrunch.

zh.title: 专家称Anthropic Fable的利用并非Kimi K3表现如此出色的原因
zh.summary: AI专家对中国Kimi K3模型通过Anthropic Fable的模型蒸馏获得其能力的说法提出了质疑，认为这一进步来自其他途径。这场辩论突出了关于竞争性AI开发实践的问题。

title: Google hit with $1 billion fine for breaking EU antitrust rules
summary: The EU fined Google €890 million for two Digital Markets Act violations: favoring its own services in search results and blocking alternative payment options on the Play Store. The penalties reflect escalating regulatory enforcement against anticompetitive tech practices.
content:
The European Union has fined Google's parent company Alphabet €890 million (about $1 billion) for two separate violations of the bloc's Digital Markets Act (DMA). One penalty is for giving its own products preferential treatment in search results, while the other is for blocking Android developers from sending users to alternate payment options.
A €460 million fine has been issued to Google for giving preferential treatment to its own Shopping, Hotels, and Flights services in Google Search results. The second €430 million penalty is for Play Store rules preventing developers from freely steering consumers to alternative payment systems that …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谷歌因违反欧盟反垄断规则被罚10亿美元
zh.summary: 欧盟因两项《数字市场法》违规对谷歌罚款8.9亿欧元：在搜索结果中偏好自身服务，以及在Play Store上阻止替代支付选项。这些处罚反映了监管机构对反竞争科技实践的不断升级的执法。

title: Google now lets you sign in to your account using a selfie video
summary: Google introduced a new biometric authentication method allowing users to sign in using facial recognition via selfie video verification. The feature provides an additional account recovery option for users locked out or without access to traditional credentials.
content:
Google announced yet another way to gain access to your account if you get locked out, forget your password, or don't have access to the phone, computer, or two-factor authentication apps you typically use. As the name implies, selfie video lets you capture a short video of your face on a mobile device or PC, which is then compared to an earlier video that Google keeps on file to confirm you're the account owner.
Setting up the selfie video feature simply requires you to look at your device's camera and follow a series of onscreen prompts that guide you through simple head movements to ensure multiple angles of your face are captured. It's  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谷歌现已支持通过自拍视频登录账户
zh.summary: 谷歌推出了新的生物识别认证方式，允许用户通过自拍视频的面部识别来登录账户。该功能为被锁定在账户外或无法使用传统凭证的用户提供了额外的账户恢复选项。

title: Framework’s premium laptop is shipping with less RAM
summary: Framework announced pricing updates for its Laptop 13 Pro due to memory supplier costs doubling, forcing configuration changes and delayed availability for some preorders. The supply chain disruption highlights ongoing challenges in premium hardware manufacturing.
content:
The Framework Laptop 13 Pro configuration you wanted may not be available for a while. | Image: Framework	

RAMageddon has claimed yet another victim, with Framework now announcing a "major and unfortunate" pricing update for its upcoming premium laptop - which also impacts folks who preordered it. Memory configurations for the Laptop 13 Pro have been adjusted after Framework says it received cost updates from its memory supplier that "are more than double that of the prior inventory."
While Framework says it has enough LPCAMM2 memory modules on hand to cover all existing preorders, they're not the right mix of 64GB, 32GB, and 16GB modules to match all preorder configurations. The company is now notifying some customers that the memory configurat …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Framework高端笔记本电脑内存配置缩水
zh.summary: Framework由于内存供应商成本翻倍，宣布调整其Laptop 13 Pro的定价，导致配置变更和部分预订交货延迟。供应链中断凸显了高端硬件制造持续存在的挑战。

title: ServiceNow bets $40 million on Indian banking software specialist to expand its financial services push
summary: ServiceNow is investing $40 million in BusinessNext, an Indian banking software specialist, to expand its AI-powered financial services offerings globally. This strategic partnership positions both companies to accelerate their presence in enterprise banking technology.
content: ServiceNow's investment gives BusinessNext a strategic partner to expand its AI-powered banking software globally.

zh.title: ServiceNow投入4000万美元支持印度银行软件专家以扩展其金融服务业务
zh.summary: ServiceNow向印度银行软件专家BusinessNext投入4000万美元，以全球范围内扩展其AI驱动的金融服务产品。这一战略合作将帮助两家公司加快在企业银行技术领域的发展。

title: Orcas team up to ram sunfish until they explode
summary: Orcas have been observed working together to ram sunfish in coordinated attacks, a behavior researchers believe may help younger orcas learn to feed efficiently or serve a recreational purpose. The coordinated hunting strategy demonstrates sophisticated social learning among marine mammals.
content: “We think this may help younger orcas feed more easily, or it could also just be for fun.”

zh.title: 虎鲸集体撞击太阳鱼直到其爆炸
zh.summary: 研究人员观察到虎鲸通过协调一致的攻击方式撞击太阳鱼，这种行为可能帮助年轻虎鲸学习有效捕食或用于娱乐目的。这种协调的捕猎策略展现了海洋哺乳动物之间复杂的社会学习能力。

title: Lego’s Donkey Kong arcade machine lets Mario jump endless barrels — Miyamoto is reportedly happy
summary: Lego's $200 Donkey Kong arcade machine designed by Carl Merriam has reportedly won approval from Mario creator Shigeru Miyamoto. The working game set follows Lego's previous gaming nostalgia releases like the Game Boy and pinball machine.
content:
Carl Merriam has designed some of my favorite nostalgia-inducing Lego sets, including the Lego Nintendo Game Boy and Piranha Plant. He's assisted on the incredible Lion Knights' Castle, Galaxy Explorer, and Pirates of Barracuda Bay. 
Now, he's helped the company create a $200 Donkey Kong arcade machine set that managed to win even Mario creator Shigeru Miyamoto's favor - or so he's told.
It doesn't play quite like Donkey Kong, of course. Jumpman, the character that would be renamed Mario, can never reach the top under his own power. But like Lego's $230 pinball machine, it does contain a basic fully functional game. There's a working joyst …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 乐高大金刚街机让马里奥无限跳跃——据传宫本茂很满意
zh.summary: 据报道，由卡尔·梅里亚姆设计的价值200美元的乐高大金刚街机获得了马里奥创造者宫本茂的批准。这款可工作的游戏套装延续了乐高之前的游戏怀旧产品，如Game Boy和弹球机。
